itinerary.route: Puerto Williams to Laguna del Salto
itinerary.mapNote: Town exit, immediate subantarctic forest. Wind picks up fast. 280m.

itinerary.route: Laguna del Salto to Laguna Los Dientes
itinerary.mapNote: First views of the Dientes spires. Most dramatic section. 430m.

itinerary.route: Laguna Los Dientes to Laguna Escondida
itinerary.mapNote: Cross Col sur Paso Virginia. Beech forest camp. 350m.
Southernmost section. Exposed moorland. Serious wind exposure. 450m.
Final descent to world's southernmost city. Circuit complete. 50m.

waypoints.name: Dientes de Navarino
waypoints.note: The 'Teeth of Navarino'. Southernmost trekking peaks in the world.

waypoints.name: Paso Virginia
waypoints.note: Main col crossing. Exposed to Fuegian winds. Usually snowfield.

waypoints.name: Beagle Channel View
waypoints.note: Views across Beagle Channel to Argentine Tierra del Fuego.

waypoints.name: Puerto Williams
waypoints.note: World's southernmost city. Population ~2,800. End of the trail.
